title: melica ciliata var. micrantha
intro: Melica ciliata var. micrantha, also known as small-fruited melic grass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Melica ciliata var. micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
